name: DEAD DANDY

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Social Faux Pas
abilities.text: Once per activation. When an enemy model within 4" gains an Entranced token, this model may move up to 4".

actions.name: Treacherous Strike
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has range "(melee)1" or (gun)6".
actions.effects: If there are no different enemy models within 2" of the target, this attack deals +2 damage.

triggers.name: Mutilate
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has a Slow token, deal +1 damage. Otherwise, it gains a Slow token.

triggers.name: Firm Disinvitation
triggers.text: After resolving, move the target up to 3".

actions.name: Proper Murder Mystery
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a Scheme or Remains marker.
actions.effects: Make either a Scheme or Remains marker in base contact with the target. Then, remove the target.

triggers.name: The Fog Rises
triggers.text: This model gains an Aura (Concealment) token.

triggers.name: "Oh, It Was You Again..."
triggers.text: Another friendly model in LoS may declare an action targeting the made marker.

extraction_notes: Treacherous Strike has range '*' with declaration-phase choice between melee 1" and gun 6" - classified as action_type: 'variable'
Text rendering preserved: '(melee)1"' and '(gun)6"' for range options in costs_and_restrictions
